description_long: This is a large, modern house with a flat roof and a multi-level layout, featuring a mix of white and brown exterior finishes. The structure includes expansive glass windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The property is surrounded by a low decorative fence and landscaped with green lawns, bushes, and a cluster of trees, as well as a swimming pool in the backyard. The front facade is defined by a wide driveway, a prominent entryway, and geometric architectural elements. The house appears to have multiple balconies and terraces, enhancing outdoor living space. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of natural and built environments.
description: A large, modern flat-roofed house with expansive glass windows, landscaped gardens, and a swimming pool, featuring a mix of white and brown finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, decorative fencing, and landscaped garden with a pool on the left.
description_view_1: Rear/side view highlighting the backyard, swimming pool, green lawn, and the arrangement of rooms and terraces.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the flat roof, multiple balconies, and the geometric arrangement of the house's rear facade.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the lush garden area, side terraces, and the layered structure of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Wide main entry with double doors, steps, a small overhang, and decorative fencing flanking the entrance
